description: Document in Arabic script. Possibly describing the locations of different properties. Several names appear in the list: Taqiyy al-Dīn. . . [...] al-Naṣrānī mustawqid al-ḥammām ('the kindler of the bath'). . . Ṣāfī. . . al-rayyis Najā. . . Aḥmad al-Qashshāsh b. ʿAbd al-Malik. Reused for Hebrew literary text.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
